events.title: Diwali Celebration
events.description: Celebrate the Festival of Lights with traditional performances, delicious food, and cultural activities. Join us for an evening of joy, music, and community bonding.

events.title: Holi Color Festival
events.description: Experience the vibrant colors of Holi! Join us for music, dance, traditional sweets, and color play. A fun-filled celebration for all ages.

events.title: Indian Independence Day
events.description: Commemorate India's Independence Day with flag hoisting, cultural performances, patriotic songs, and traditional cuisine. Celebrate the spirit of freedom together.

events.title: Yoga Workshop
events.description: Join us for a rejuvenating yoga session led by experienced instructors. Suitable for all levels, this workshop will help you improve flexibility, strength, and mindfulness.

events.title: Indian Cooking Class
events.description: Discover the secrets of Indian cuisine! Learn to prepare traditional dishes with hands-on guidance. Enjoy the meal you create together with fellow participants.
